summary: Completed e2e testing of Blockchain Wallet Platform. Fixed critical bug in /api/wallet/unpaid-fees endpoint. Verified popup bug fix - modal now only appears after clicking 'Click here to fix your account' button, NOT on page load. Admin Users and KYC Queue pages load correctly.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console due to span/tr nesting in table - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in server.py line 418: sum() of empty list returns 0 (int), not Decimal - changed to use sum() with Decimal('0') start value
seed_data_creation: Created frozen test user testfrozen@test.com with unusual_activity freeze_type, $5000 USDC balance, $125 unpaid fees
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical functionality tested and working. Popup bug fix verified - modal only shows after button click. Admin panel fully functional. Email sending with Resend API is configured and working.

bugs_fixed.issue: AttributeError: 'int' object has no attribute 'quantize' - sum() returns 0 when no transactions with fees
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed sum(Decimal(t['fee']) for t in transactions) to sum((Decimal(t['fee']) for t in transactions), Decimal('0'))

verified_features: Random popup bug - FIXED: popup does NOT appear automatically on page load for frozen accounts
Random popup bug - VERIFIED: popup ONLY appears after clicking 'Click here to fix your account' button
Admin panel Users page - WORKING: data loads correctly with search and filter functionality
Admin panel KYC Queue - WORKING: data loads correctly, shows pending submissions
Authentication flow - WORKING: login/logout works correctly for admin and users
Frozen user experience - WORKING: freeze alert card shows correctly in wallet dashboard
Email sending - WORKING: email is sent when user clicks fix account button (Resend API configured)
